svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Claude" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="UDS Message Format Mapping" id="uds-message-format"> <mxGraphModel dx="985" dy="1642" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1000" pageHeight="820" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;" value="Common UDS Message Format & Field Mapping to DCM / DEM Services" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="900" x="50" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="genLabel" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="Generic ISO 14229-1 message layout (all services follow this shape):" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="600" x="55" y="48" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="reqLbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11.5;fontStyle=1;" value="Request" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="120" x="55" y="78" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="reqSid" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d9ecff;strokeColor=#1f5fa8;fontSize=10.5;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="SID
(1 byte)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="100" x="55" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="reqSub" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff3d6;strokeColor=#c99a2e;fontSize=10.5;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;dashed=1;" value="Sub-function
(1 byte, optional)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="155" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="reqParam" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e6f5e6;strokeColor=#3a8a3a;fontSize=10.5;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Parameter
(DID / RID / groupOfDTC, 1-3 bytes)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="315" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="reqData" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eeeeee;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=10.5;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;dashed=1;" value="Data Record
(variable, optional — e.g. write value, routine control option record)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="300" x="535" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="posLbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11.5;fontStyle=1;" value="Positive Response" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="200" x="55" y="164" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="posSid" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d9ecff;strokeColor=#1f5fa8;fontSize=10.5;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="SID + 0x40
(1 byte)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="100" x="55" y="186" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="posSub" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff3d6;strokeColor=#c99a2e;fontSize=10.5;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;dashed=1;" value="Sub-function echo
(optional)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="155" y="186" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="posParam" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e6f5e6;strokeColor=#3a8a3a;fontSize=10.5;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Parameter echo
(DID / RID, optional)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="315" y="186" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="posData" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eeeeee;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=10.5;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Data Record
(requested data / status / results — filled in by RTE-SWC or DEM)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="300" x="535" y="186" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="negLbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11.5;fontStyle=1;" value="Negative Response" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="200" x="55" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="negSid" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe0dc;strokeColor=#b83f2e;fontSize=10.5;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="0x7F
(1 byte)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="90" x="55" y="272" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="negOrig" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe0dc;strokeColor=#b83f2e;fontSize=10.5;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Original SID
(1 byte)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="145" y="272" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="negNrc" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe0dc;strokeColor=#b83f2e;fontSize=10.5;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="NRC
(1 byte — negative response code)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="285" y="272" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="divider" parent="1" style="line;strokeColor=#999999;strokeWidth=1.2;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="10" width="900" x="55" y="336" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="exLabel" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="Worked examples — fields mapped to the services in sections 2.1-2.3:" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="700" x="55" y="346" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ex1Lbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11.5;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#0d3a6b;" value="ReadDataByIdentifier (0x22 / 0x62) — served by DCM's DSP via RTE/SWC" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="700" x="55" y="378" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ex1Sid" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d9ecff;strokeColor=#1f5fa8;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="SID = 0x22 / 0x62" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="140" x="55" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ex1Did" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e6f5e6;strokeColor=#3a8a3a;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Parameter = DID (2 bytes, repeatable)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="220" x="195" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ex1Data" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eeeeee;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Data = dataRecord per DID, in request order (from RTE / SWC)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="380" x="415" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ex2Lbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11.5;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#0d3a6b;" value="RoutineControl (0x31 / 0x71) — served by DCM's DSP via RTE/SWC" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="700" x="55" y="456" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ex2Sid" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d9ecff;strokeColor=#1f5fa8;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="SID = 0x31 / 0x71" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="120" x="55" y="478" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ex2Sub" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff3d6;strokeColor=#c99a2e;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Sub-function = start (0x01) / stop (0x02) / requestResults (0x03)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="240" x="185" y="478" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ex2Rid" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e6f5e6;strokeColor=#3a8a3a;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Parameter = RID (2 bytes)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="160" x="435" y="478" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ex2Data" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eeeeee;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Data = routineControlOptionRecord (req) / routineStatusRecord (resp), from RTE / SWC" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="300" x="605" y="478" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ex3Lbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11.5;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#6b1d0d;" value="ReadDTCInformation (0x19 / 0x59) — DCM's DSP calls DEM's Dcm Interface" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="700" x="55" y="534" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ex3Sid" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d9ecff;strokeColor=#1f5fa8;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="SID = 0x19 / 0x59" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="120" x="55" y="556" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ex3Sub" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff3d6;strokeColor=#c99a2e;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Sub-function = report type, e.g. reportDTCByStatusMask (0x02), reportDTCSnapshot... (0x04)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="260" x="185" y="556" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ex3Param" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e6f5e6;strokeColor=#3a8a3a;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Parameter = DTCStatusMask / DTCMaskRecord" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="200" x="455" y="556" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ex3Data" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe0dc;strokeColor=#b83f2e;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Data = DTC + status records (Event/Status Mgr) or snapshot/extended data records (Freeze Frame Mgr) — from DEM" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="345" x="665" y="556" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ex4Lbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11.5;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#6b1d0d;" value="ClearDiagnosticInformation (0x14 / 0x54) — DCM's DSP calls DEM's Dcm Interface" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="700" x="55" y="612" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ex4Sid" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d9ecff;strokeColor=#1f5fa8;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="SID = 0x14 / 0x54" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="120" x="55" y="634" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ex4Param" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e6f5e6;strokeColor=#3a8a3a;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Parameter = groupOfDTC (3 bytes)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="200" x="185" y="634" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ex4Data" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe0dc;strokeColor=#b83f2e;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="No data record — response only confirms clearing; DEM's Event Memory Manager purges matching status/freeze-frame/extended-data entries" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="420" x="395" y="634" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fafafa;strokeColor=#999999;fontSize=10.5;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=6;" value="Color key: Blue = SID field Orange = Sub-function field Green = Parameter (DID/RID/groupOfDTC) field Grey = Data record, sourced from RTE/SWC Red = Data record, sourced from DEM" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="900" x="55" y="700" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div: Color key: Blue = SID field Orange = Sub-function field Green = Parameter (DID/RID/groupOfDTC) field Grey = Data record, sourced from RTE/SWC Red = Data record, sourced from DEM
